name: Draw Things Image Generation
description: Local AI image generation using Draw Things CLI on Apple Silicon. Supports SD, SDXL, FLUX, and other Draw Things models without API costs.
author: Andres Rovira

modelsDir.description: Optional override for models directory. Supports ~ for home directory.

outputDir.description: Directory to save generated images. Supports ~ for home directory.

defaultWidth.description: Optional default output width when no size or aspect ratio is requested. Rounded to a multiple of 64. If omitted, model metadata chooses the size.

defaultHeight.description: Optional default output height when no size or aspect ratio is requested. Rounded to a multiple of 64. If omitted, model metadata chooses the size.

defaultSteps.description: Override sampling steps. If omitted, model metadata chooses a sensible default.

defaultCfg.description: Override CFG guidance scale. If omitted, model metadata chooses a sensible default.

defaultEditStrength.description: Default img2img/edit strength. Higher values change the source image more.

defaultPromptMode.description: Prompt handling mode. auto uses model metadata, natural passes the prompt through, tagged converts for SD 1.5/tag models.

enablePromptOptimization.description: Whether to apply model-aware prompt optimization. Defaults to true except for natural prompt mode.

highResSteps.description: Steps for img2img upscaling when generating SD 1.5 images at high resolution.

timeoutMs.description: Timeout for each draw-things-cli generation process, in milliseconds.
